text:
Snoop Dogg has made possibly the coolest piece of Olympics merch – and it’s getting the attention it deserves.

Snoop Dogghas been a breakout star of theParis2024 Olympicsas heproudly carried the Olympic torchthrough Saint-Denis and is aspecial correspondent for NBC.

Although some have been confused by thisside quest from the star, many have been delighted tosee him at the gamesand adding a fun je ne sais quoi to the games.

In celebration of his association with the games, a pin was made in his honour.

The silver pin showed an image of the Drop It Like It’s Hot rapper wearing his trademark glasses, and a blue tracksuit while blowing out smoke rings in the colours matching the iconic Olympic rings.

The pin also showed the Eiffel Tower in the background with the word Paris etched on the side.

Snoop, whose real name is Calvin Broadus Jr, gave US athlete and tennis star Coco Gauff one of these pins in an exchange documented on Instagram.

A video in collaboration with the United States Tennis Association, Team USA, Snoop Dogg and the Women’s Tennis Association showed the rapper wearing a T-shirt with Coco on it.

In the video, the rapper held a pin to the camera and said: ‘Hey Coco, its big Snoop Dogg. I have something for you beautiful. This is for you… Go USA.’

The tennis star happily received the pin and replied in the same video: ‘Hey Mr Snoop. Thank you for this pin, this is the best pin.’

She then showed off the pin on her Instagram story with a caption that read: ‘I win the pin game!’

Fans loved the fact that Coco called the rapper ‘Mr Snoop’ and many were impressed by the pin itself.

‘Mr. Snoop.🥺 So cute & respectful.❤️🗯💙,’ commented Hagansk1.

‘Awww 😭 this was so nice of Snoop and how respectful of Coco calling him Mr. Snoop! ♥️🙏🏽’ commented pastorlisadross.

‘Mr. Snoop. Sometimes I forget how young she is. Sweet. The pin is dope,’ commented Snobbyfit.

‘I want a Snoop Olympic pin😂,’ commented dara_mangored.

Thexaefiles also commented: ‘Nah where can I BUY ONEEE.’

Although the artist’spublic persona has been built around his use of cannabis, he toldTime,that he had no intention of smoking marijuana – which is illegal in Paris – while he was attending the Olympic Games.

‘I’m a very legal guy,’ he said. ‘I plan on going out there and doing NBC Olympic work. Being clean as a book, clean as the athletes. They can test me if they want to.

The oral‑care gadget making waves thanks to its powerful clean

‘I’m going to be out there doing what I’m supposed to be doing to make sure I bring home the gold. Which is me.’

title: Fans are obsessed with Snoop Dogg's 'dope' Olympics pin | Metro News
description: Snoop Dogg has released some Olympics merch and honestly it might be the coolest piece of merch to emerge from the Paris Games.
